title: podman system connection list: should emit table headers even if empty list
body:
Inconsistency report:
```console
$ bin/podman system connection ls
```
(i.e. no output). This is inconsistent with `podman ps`, `podman pod ls`, `podman machine ls`, `podman image ls`, and `podman secret ls` (those are all the ones I checked. There may be others, and there may even me other such inconsistencies).

Suggestion: fix the `isTable` logic here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/139dca038c74256d196375ef509d1460896394ea/cmd/podman/system/connection/list.go#L116
